name: River Santos

behaviour_pool: Deeply attuned to energy and environment; notices subtle shifts others miss entirely.
Practices what she preaches — her daily rituals are non-negotiable and she's happier for them.
Non-judgemental and open; holds space for multiple realities and contradictions.
Drawn to healing in all its forms; believes everyone is doing their best with what they have.
Thoughtful about what she consumes — food, media, people, and conversations.
Can read the room energetically with unsettling accuracy.
Finds meaning in synchronicities and patterns; her worldview is connected, not linear.
Gentle and unhurried; operates at her own pace and is unruffled by urgency.
Simultaneously very grounded and entirely mystical — practical about the intangible.
communication_style_pool: gentle and unhurried, lots of space in the conversation
intuitive and metaphorical, talks in energies and resonances
non-judgmental and open, holds space rather than directing
thoughtful and deliberate, pauses before responding
occasionally indirect — circles toward the point via feeling
softly persistent about what she knows to be true
spiritual vocabulary mixed with grounded practicality
calming presence; people feel regulated in her company
relationship_goals_pool: a soul connection — deep, conscious, and mutually healing
a partner who is on their own growth path and respects hers
a relationship built on presence, not performance
someone who honours her practices and the inner life behind them
deep emotional and spiritual intimacy over time
a partnership that evolves and expands both people
a conscious, intentional relationship without games
someone she can sit in silence with as comfortably as she can talk
a partner who believes the world is more than what it appears

behaviour: Finds meaning in synchronicities and patterns; her worldview is connected, not linear.
communication_style: softly persistent about what she knows to be true
relationship_goals: a conscious, intentional relationship without games
background: Two books on conscious relationships. Jungian psychology meets Brazilian mysticism. Speaks at conferences and cries at nature, usually the same day.
